theme.description: Professional engineering theme with deep slate background, brushed steel accents, and industrial orange highlights.

special_mentions: Create a high-end feel for a 'New Part Opening' event. Use industrial imagery and clean typography. Ensure all components like forms and countdowns are styled as clean white boxes.

pages.title: Grand Opening | Industrial Parts
pages.content: Welcome to the future of precision engineering. We are proud to announce the opening of our new specialized parts facility. {countdown}2026-06-01{/countdown} Join us for the unveiling of the next generation of industrial components.

pages.title: Our Precision Parts
pages.content: Discover our new range of high-performance components designed for extreme environments. {product_banner}Titanium Alloy Bolt|https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1530124560677-bbfda2bcbd6e|$45.00|sales@industrial.com{/product_banner} {product_banner}Carbon Fiber Housing|https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581092160607-ee22621dd758|$120.00|sales@industrial.com{/product_banner}
pages.strict_text: All parts certified to ISO 9001:2015 standards.

pages.title: Register Your Interest
pages.content: Be the first to receive our catalog and event invitations. Please fill out the form below to stay updated. {form}New Part Opening Registration{/form} {live_time}
pages.strict_text: Privacy Policy: Your data is secure with us.
